title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Battery icon colors and labels (H/C/L/R) do not update correctly based on charge level and device power state on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the battery icon(s) displayed for the connected device.
4. For a headset (single device): Verify a single battery icon is shown.
5. For a headset with a charging case: Verify two battery icons are shown, labeled "H" (headset) and "C" (case).
6. For earbuds: Verify three battery icons are shown, labeled "L" (left), "R" (right), and "C" (case).
7. Check the battery icon color corresponds to the charge level: 100%–40% = black (white in dark mode), 39%–20% = yellow, 19%–1% = red, 0% = empty.
9. Observe the battery icon(s) on the Home screen.
expected: Battery icon(s) display correctly per device type with proper labels (H, C, L, R). Icon color matches charge level thresholds. When the headset is turned off, battery icons are greyed out with the last known percentage displayed.
